approvedBy: Steve via Codex main session overnight approval
approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Dev-Hub intelligence build and instructed Codex to keep going, park blocked work, and expose whether auditors are flowing or sitting without unsafe automation.
scopeSummary: Expose a read-only Dev Hub Auditor Flow readback across scheduled/manual auditors, report-only/read-only output, review gates, route review pressure, and hygiene pressure.
constraints: Do not run live audits, health jobs, extraction, source sync, provider/model calls, login, Browserbase, paid/private source work, or external writes.
Do not write report artifacts, atoms, chunks, facts, routes, backlog cards, Scoper cards, Portfolio records, Current Sprint overlays, or approval records from this readback.
Do not approve, apply, reject, snooze, reroute, or promote live action routes.
Do not auto-promote audit findings or Director recommendations into backlog, Scoper, Portfolio, or Current Sprint.
Do not send Telegram, email, Slack, Agent Feedback, public messages, or Harlan notifications outside the governed ship gate.
Fail proof if audit findings are represented as automatic backlog, route, Scoper, or external movement.
